free_text: Neutron double-differential scattering cross-section
by beryllium
Curves of data are given.
No INDC(CCP) rep. was found at NDS web-site.
Exp.details
No data for EXFOR.
IBR-30 reactor in the reactor mode
Polycrystalline metallic beryllium. Grain size is
less then 56 micrometers, sample density is 1.877
gram/cm3. Sample have a shape of hollow cylinder,
inner radius - 4.77 cm, outer radius is 4.86 cm
height 14 cm
Corrections were made on the attenuation of the
incident and single-time scattered neutrons, on the
transmission of the neutron-guide, on the detector's
efficiency
Type of error is not explained in article
Glazkov,  1990-06

data Subents.
